metadata.title: Boulder Hranice
metadata.description: Outdoor artificial bouldering wall in Hranice

howTo.title: How to Boulder
howTo.intro: Bouldering is climbing short walls without a rope. Here's everything you need to know to get started.

steps.title: What Is Bouldering?
steps.description: Bouldering is a form of climbing performed on low walls (up to ~4 meters) without ropes. You climb over a crash pad that cushions your falls.

steps.title: Start Position
steps.description: Every boulder problem starts with both hands on the designated starting hold(s). Your feet can be placed on any hold from the route (same color/label).

steps.title: Topping Out
steps.description: A boulder is successfully completed when you hold the final (top) hold with both hands in a controlled, stable position.

steps.title: Follow the Colors
steps.description: Each boulder problem is marked with holds of the same color or with numbered tags. Only use the holds that belong to your route.

steps.title: Falling Safely
steps.description: When you fall, try to land on both feet with bent knees on the crash pad. Avoid reaching out with your hands to break a fall.

steps.title: Improvise Your Own Route
steps.description: The wall is full of holds — you don't have to stick to the marked problems. Pick any holds you like and create your own route. Use your imagination and skill to design challenges that match your level.

gallery.title: Wall Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Photos of the wall with numbered boulder problems. Use these as your guide when climbing.

boulders.title: Boulder Problems
boulders.subtitle: Browse and rate all boulder problems on the wall.
boulders.loginToTop: Log in to mark as topped

map.subtitle: The wall is located in the sports area in Hranice.
